ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Continued To Apr-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Lauren Peebles, Esq., for Thomas Tandy, Administrator.

At the court's query, Ms. Peebles reports that an additional bond should be filed soon and that she is working on a petition for final distribution. Ms. Peebles requests a continuance. The court confirms that it will grant Ms. Peebles' request for a continuance and reminds her that it will be expecting her to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration prior to the next hearing date.

The matter is continued to Apr-15-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-06-2023 Continued To Feb-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Lauren Peebles, Esq., for Thomas Tandy, Administrator.

At the court's query, counsel reports that previously submitted Ex Parte petition for increase of bond had been rejected due to an oversight but that a revised application is pending in the court's efiling queue. Counsel also reports that a Petition for Final Distribution should be filed shortly.

The court acknowledges Counsel's report and there is discussion and confirmation of a continuance date. Counsel is instructed to file either a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Status of Administration by the next calling of this matter.

The subject matter is continued to Feb-14-2024 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Continued To Mar-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Peebles appeared by zoom for Administrator.

The court stated that it is aware that the other matter is going to result in a distribution to this estate, and question why the administrator is not bonded yet. Mrs. Peebles stated that her client is not bonded because the money is not ready to come in, that once the estate is distributed in the parallel estate the administrator will have funds to pay for the bond premium, that the other matter was continued to March 8th. Mrs. Peebles also stated that she has addressed the matters in the hearing notes, that she hopes it will be approved, that the funds will remain in the parallel case until the bond is in place, and then they will be distributed to this case, and that she can file a declaration to inform the court. Status on close of estate is continued to March 27, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Continued To Feb-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Peebles, via Zoom, for Thomas Tandy, Administrator.

MS. Peebles reports that the related Estate matter has been continued to Dec-21-2022 and that this matter will not have any assets until that related matter is resolved and the anticipated distributions have been made. Ms. Peebles advises that she could have filed a report to approve status of administration but wanted to save estate assets. Ms. Peebles is reminded that the current bond in this matter is insufficient.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Feb-27-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-14-2022 Continued To Nov-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Peebles, via Zoom, for Thomas Tandy, Personal Representative.

Ms. Peebles reports that this matter is close to being resolved but that it is contingent upon the resolution of the related Estate of Julia Tandy matter. Ms Peebles acknowledges the requirement of an ex parte application to increase the current bond in this matter and requests a continuance.

The matter is continued to Nov-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-17-2022 Continued To Sep-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Buggy, via ZOOM, for Thomas Tandy, Petitioner.

The court begins by advising counsel of its concern that Felipe signed an assignment on behalf of his daughter Cecilia. The court then confirms with counsel that his client is amenable to limited authority if the court appoints him as Administrator. The court queries counsel regarding the intent to keep or sell the real property. Counsel advises that he is unsure if the plan is to sell at the moment but that it may be sold at some point in the future. Counsel also reports that his client has been in touch with other heirs regarding waiving bond with the exception of Felipe who has yet to reply. Counsel also reports that Cecilia will be turning 18 soon. The court advises counsel that it is inclined to appoint his client as Administrator with limited authority and a minimum bond. Counsel agrees with the court's tentative ruling.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Letters of Administration is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: B. Tso. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-13-2021 Continued To Feb-24-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sil Vossler appeared by zoom for Thomas Tandy.

The Court noted that this matter has been continued several times and that there are a lot of outstanding issues. Mr. Vossler stated that there have been complications with the Mother's estate with another family member that has surfaced. The Court noted that this is petition for administration, stated that the issue raised by Vossler has nothing to do with this and questions why not continue with administration of the estate. Mr. Vossler stated that he has two weeks left at Open Door Legal, that he can file a supplemental pleading in response to the Examiner's notes and get the case transferred to Attorney Kevin Buggy and that Mr. Buggy will likely be handling both matters. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to February 24, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
